title: m012 period record
description: Per-period mint/burn record for the fixed cap dynamic supply mechanism. All token amounts are in uregen.

supply_before.description: Supply at start of period in uregen

supply_after.description: Supply at end of period in uregen

minted.description: Tokens minted (regrowth) in this period in uregen

burned.description: Tokens burned in this period in uregen

regrowth_rate.description: Effective regrowth rate r = r_base * effective_multiplier * ecological_multiplier

effective_multiplier.description: Phase-gated multiplier (staking, stability, or max of both)

ecological_multiplier.description: Ecological multiplier (1.0 when disabled in v0)

headroom_before.description: Cap headroom before period: hard_cap - supply_before (uregen)

headroom_after.description: Cap headroom after period: hard_cap - supply_after (uregen)

m014_state.description: M014 module state at time of computation
